The Mindbender 108TiŌĆÖs are burly and ready to tackle any lineup. These all-terrain freeride weapons are outfitted with a stiff flex, mid-fat waist, and a long turn radius. An elongated tail rocker and Titanal Y-Beam construction keeps things stable when speeds get high and conditions get choppy. Mindbender 116C x Anthem 125 BOA┬« are the ultimate tools for @manon_loschi The Anthem Collection is our women-specific all-mountain boot, packed with cutting edge technology for advanced skiers that demand precision and control. Outfitted with BOA┬« Fit System Tech and a precision-engineered shell it delivers unmatched responsiveness and energy transfer, making it the ideal choice for high speed, high-performance runs. The Mindbender 116C is the ultimate versatile powder crusher. Designed to take on even the burliest of lines while still staying maneuverable and playful in deep snow.
